author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 16 APPROVE. Regen script (line 573) updated to emit mean: safe_mean(d3) for 3d_identity_scale (matches 2d_cholesky's pattern). Fixture surgically patched with mean: [1.0, 2.0, 3.0] — full regen deferred due to local torch 2.6.0 vs pinned 2.11.0 mismatch (regen would change torch_version metadata + Infinity rendering); the script change still lands for correct future regens. Test fallback simplified to fvec(&case[mean]); loc-mean consistency guard now unconditional. Sabotage demo: mean → [99,99,99] caught at line 81 with diff=98. distributions conformance: 60 PASS.
